insights.title: Business Name and Category Clarity
insights.details: The business name appears generic or unclear, with limited descriptive keywords aligning with typical local service terms; the category may lack specificity or clarity, reducing AI-readiness.

insights.title: AI-Compatible Descriptions
insights.details: Descriptions do not contain sufficient entities or detailed service keywords, limiting the scope for AI-enhanced optimization and context understanding.

insights.title: Review Sentiment
insights.details: Recent reviews show mixed sentiment with some positive mentions; however, limited quantity or consistency hampers full sentiment analysis and influence on AI-based relevance.

findings.title: OSM Data Mismatch
findings.description: No matching OSM entity was found to verify the local business details; discrepancies between GBP and OSM data suggest potential mismatch or missing data.
findings.impact: Reduces trustworthiness of location data, hampers cross-platform validation, and impairs AI-driven recommendations or localization efforts.
findings.fix_example: Verify and update the business address, website, and category in authoritative sources and ensure consistency across GBP and OSM inputs.

findings.title: Limited Entity Data
findings.description: Lack of detailed structured data and entity references in business descriptions.
findings.impact: Limits AI models' ability to accurately interpret and optimize the business profile for local SEO.
findings.fix_example: Incorporate detailed service descriptions with relevant entities, keywords, and location-specific information.
